description: The Torque Estimate node takes in the initial torque, drag resistance, and the amount of time it is simulating, then returns the torque simulation value (as a floatQ) that object will rotate in.

fields.InitialTorque: The amount of push for this torque.
fields.Drag: The amount of resistance for this torque.
fields.Time: The time in between the initial torque and now.
fields.* ([[Type:floatQ|floatQ]]): Returns the estimated torque within that time period.
